item.title: Feeding King Cobras
item.description: A close look at Chandler’s Wild Life as king cobras are fed in a controlled setting, highlighting careful animal care and observation.

item.title: Observing Giant King Cobras
item.description: A close look at giant king cobras in a wildlife setting, highlighting their behavior and natural presence.

item.title: Blue Snakes!
item.description: An educational look at blue-colored snake species, their habitats, behavior, and what makes their appearance unique in nature.

item.title: What’s a King Cobra’s Favorite Food?!
item.description: An educational look at the king cobra’s diet, exploring its natural prey and feeding behavior in the wild.

item.title: Observing a Rattlesnake in the Wild
item.description: A respectful wildlife encounter featuring a rattlesnake, highlighting safe observation and appreciation for nature.

item.title: Observing a Lion Up Close
